channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP accelerates Trump judge confirmations as pressure builds to kill Senate blue slip
item.description: President Donald Trump called for eliminating the blue slip tradition, but Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., warned that "nuking the blue slip would be a huge...

item.title: Venezuela Orders Arrest of Opposition Leader's Ally
item.description: Venezuela's top prosecutor on Monday said his office requested the arrest of one of the closest allies of opposition leader Maria Corina Machado less ...

item.title: Watch: People Have a Little Fun With Some Epic Trolling of the Anti-ICE Crew
Maxwell Ends Quick House Probe Appearance by Pleading the Fifth
CENTCOM Chief's Role in Oman Talks Signals U.S. Military Edge, Iranians Claim It 'Endangered' Diplomacy
Hochul running mate voted to allow noncitizen voting in NYC elections
item.description: Empire State Gov. Kathy Hochul's running mate Adrienne Adams previously sought to allow some noncitizens to vote in Big Apple municipal elections.

item.title: TPUSA Halftime Show Draws 5.7M Seeking Bad Bunny Alternative
item.description: Turning Point USA's All-American Halftime Show drew more than 5.7 million viewers on Sunday as a patriotic alternative to the NFL's controversial Supe...

item.title: US Boards 'Dark Fleet' Tanker Loaded With Venezuelan Oil in the Indian Ocean
Morning Minute: The Deep State Who Cried Wolf
Federal judge orders Fulton County election raid documents to be unsealed
item.description: A federal judge gave the government until Tuesday to release a redacted search warrant affidavit from a January FBI raid that seized 2020 election mat...

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads Fifth Amendment, dodges questions in House Oversight Epstein probe
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell refused to answer questions before the House Oversight Committee on Monday morning.

item.title: Mexico's Sheinbaum: Oil Shipments to Cuba Currently Halted
item.description: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum said the country's oil shipments to Cuba are currently halted as her government seeks to support Cuba without tri...

item.title: GOP Senators Come to Stephen Miller's Defense
item.description: Republican senators led by South Carolina Sen. Lindsey Graham are mounting a public defense of Stephen Miller as divisions widen within the GOP over t...

item.title: CNN: Senators' Stock Trades Spark Ethics Outrage
item.description: A bipartisan group of at least nine U.S. senators reported stock transactions last year involving companies in industries overseen by the committees t...

item.title: US forces hunt down and board tanker ship defying Trump admin quarantine
item.description: U.S. forces boarded the ship that defied President Donald Trump's quarantine of sanctioned ships in the Caribbean, according to the War Department.
